title: Context Parallel Position Embedding
description: System enables or disables context parallelism for distributed position embedding computation across MultiviewVideoPositionEmb and MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb classes.
use_cases: Forward Pass — Single View with CP
Forward Pass — Multiview RoPE with CP
Forward Pass — Multiview SinCos with CP
actors_to_use_cases: DiTNetwork → Forward Pass — Single View with CP
DiTNetwork → Forward Pass — Multiview RoPE with CP
DiTNetwork → Forward Pass — Multiview SinCos with CP
ContextParallelGroup (torch.distributed.ProcessGroup) → Split Embeddings for CP Rank

MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb: __init__(head_dim, len_h, len_w, len_t, base_fps=24, h/w/t_extrapolation_ratio=1.0, n_views=4)
generate_embeddings(B_T_H_W_C, fps, h/w/t_ntk_factor) → concatenates n_views calls to generate_embedding_for_batch

when_cp_enabled: 1. Read local (split) tensor shape: B, T_local, H, W, C
2. Reconstruct full T: B_T_H_W_C = (B, T_local * cp_size, H, W, C)
3. Call generate_embeddings(full_B_T_H_W_C, fps) to get full embeddings
4. Split full embeddings back for this CP rank via split_inputs_cp(embeddings, seq_dim, cp_group)
multiview_rope_cp_split_path: rearrange '(V T) H W D -> V (T H W) 1 1 D'
rearrange back 'V T 1 1 D -> (V T) 1 1 D'
multiview_sincos_cp_split_path: rearrange 'B (V T) H W C -> (B V) T H W C'
rearrange back '(B V) T H W C -> B (V T) H W C'
no_cp_multiview_rope_path: rearrange raw output 't h w d -> (t h w) 1 1 d'

key_relationships: VideoPositionEmb.forward isinstance-checks VideoRopePosition3DEmb to determine seq_dim (0 vs 1)
MultiviewVideoPositionEmb.forward isinstance-checks MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb to choose split path
important_notes: Two parallel file trees exist: diffusion/module/ (inference) and diffusion/training/module/ (training) — both implement the same classes with nearly identical logic but different split_inputs_cp import paths.
CP forward pattern: input is already pre-split by caller; the class reconstructs full size, generates full embeddings, then re-splits for the local rank.
n_views (default 4) merges camera view dimension into T; embeddings are identical per view (same generate_embedding_for_batch called n_views times).
VideoRopePosition3DEmb uses seq_dim=0 when splitting (flat (T*H*W) layout); all other embeddings use seq_dim=1 (B, T, H, W, C layout).
NTK-aware RoPE: h/w/t_ntk_factor computed from extrapolation_ratio to extend frequency range for out-of-distribution resolutions.
